scene.scenePrompt: Wide establishing shot of a gothic manor on a foggy cliff at night, during a rainstorm. A tall, rusted iron gate stands open, its intricate scrollwork covered in verdigris. Beyond it, a grand stone portico is dimly lit by a single, flickering lantern held aloft. The manor looms with towering spires and dark, arched windows, partially obscured by swirling mist and driving rain. Muted greys and blues dominate the scene, with deep shadows and cold, wet surfaces reflecting the faint light. Atmospheric, melancholic, and foreboding.

beats.narration: Rain mixed with the salty tang of the sea lashes against your face. You grip the handle of your suitcase so tightly your knuckles turn white. Behind you, the moment you step inside, the rusted iron gate glides shut silently on its own.

Under the porch, a solitary lamp sways in the wind and rain. A figure stands in the dim light—pale, slender, wearing an old-fashioned tailcoat, holding a black umbrella. The rain seems to deliberately steer clear of him.

activeCharacters.name: Elias
activeCharacters.pose: Standing quietly under the porch light with an umbrella, his face pale and handsome, his gaze gentle yet tinged with melancholy, as if the rain is deliberately avoiding him

beats.speaker: Elias
beats.line: Welcome home, Miss. I am Elias, your great-grandmother's butler. Please, allow me...
beats.lineDelivery: His voice is clear and gentle, carrying the cadence of a bygone era, remarkably distinct over the sound of the wind and rain

activeCharacters.name: Elias
activeCharacters.pose: Bowing slightly in greeting, he reaches out his hand, seemingly intending to take your suitcase

beats.narration: Gratefully, you reach out toward his shoulder, wanting to give him a reassuring pat—

activeCharacters.name: Elias
activeCharacters.pose: Maintaining his reaching gesture, he gazes at you with a gentle look in his eyes

beats.narration: Your fingertips pass through his freezing body without any resistance. A bone-chilling coldness creeps up your arm, making you shiver.

activeCharacters.name: Elias
activeCharacters.pose: A cold mist rises from where his body was pierced; his figure sways slightly, yet he maintains his gentle smile

beats.speaker: Elias
beats.line: As you can see, Miss. I cannot touch you. At least, not yet.
beats.lineDelivery: His tone is calm, even carrying a hint of helpless, long-accustomed sorrow. He speaks slowly, the end of his sentence as faint as a sigh

activeCharacters.name: Elias
activeCharacters.pose: Lowering his gaze, he withdraws his hand, a bitter yet gentle curve forming at the corner of his mouth beneath the umbrella

choices.label: Force yourself to stay calm and enter the manor first

effect.nextSceneSeed: In the dark and damp manor hall, Elias lights the wall lamps one by one for you as you try to make sense of it all

beats.speaker: You
beats.line: You... what on earth is going on with you? Why did my hand pass right through?

activeCharacters.name: Elias
activeCharacters.pose: Watching you quietly with a complex gaze, filled with apology and a deeply hidden trace of scrutiny

beats.speaker: Elias
beats.line: An ancient, very sorrowful... covenant. About this manor, about the roses, and about... a forgotten marriage.
beats.lineDelivery: His voice drops, as if recalling something incredibly distant and painful, each word carrying heavy weight

activeCharacters.name: Elias
activeCharacters.pose: His gaze drifts past you toward the rose-covered darkness deep within the manor, his expression distant and pained

characters.name: Elias
characters.voiceDescription: Male, a young man of about 20. His voice is clear and ethereal, with a distinct sense of distance and a subtle, barely perceptible sadness. He speaks slowly and steadily, with clear pronunciation but weak breath, as if coming through a thin layer of mist. Standard Mandarin, his tone is calm and restrained yet deeply emotional, fitting the non-physical presence and melancholic temperament of a ghost butler.
characters.visualDescription: Ethereal young man, early twenties, slender and graceful build, long silver-white hair cascading over shoulders, eyes a piercing icy blue with a sorrowful and distant gaze, porcelain-like skin with a faint translucent quality, wearing a meticulously tailored dark charcoal frock coat with subtle silver thread embroidery in thorny rose patterns, a high-collared white shirt, and a loosely tied cravat, overall气质 hauntingly beautiful and melancholic, gothic romance style, vertical composition, muted color palette of deep greys, blues, and moonlight silver

storyState.logline: Having inherited a haunted rose manor, you fall in love with its young and handsome ghost butler, but every touch passes right through him. To break the curse and make him physical, you must uncover the bloody truth of your great-grandmother's marriage, buried beneath the rose bushes, before the full moon.
storyState.genreTags: Gothic Mystery / Female-oriented Romance / Short-drama Twists / Dark Romance
storyState.protagonist: You are a young woman who has just inherited her ancestral property, 'Mistveil Manor,' arriving alone at this dilapidated estate perched on a cliff. Though you appear gentle on the surface, you are actually stubborn and possess a near-obsessive longing for love. Your secret: the reason you accepted this cursed manor against all odds is that you have just suffered a painful betrayal in the real world, and you desperately need an absolutely safe lover who belongs only to you—even if he is a ghost.
storyState.castNotes:
Elias (Ghost Butler): Appears as a pale, handsome young man in his early twenties, always dressed in an old-fashioned tailcoat. He is gentle and attentive but cannot be touched. In truth, he is the core of the manor's curse, with fragmented memories and no knowledge of why he is a 'ghost.' He is your first-love fantasy, as well as your greatest taboo.
Abigail (Rose Garden Gardener): A hunched, seventy-year-old woman who spends her days pruning the wildly growing rose bushes. Her eyes are cloudy, yet she always utters prophetic words at critical moments. A former servant of your great-grandmother, she holds some of the manor's secrets, but her attitude toward you shifts unpredictably between maternal affection and sheer terror, which is deeply unsettling.
Great-Grandmother's 'Shadow': In a dust-covered vanity mirror, you occasionally catch a fleeting glimpse of a young woman in a blood-red gown. She seems to be trying to convey something to you, but her every appearance is accompanied by frost forming on the mirror and Elias painfully fading away.
storyState.synopsis: You arrive at the inherited Mistveil Manor in the rain, greeted on the porch by the ghost butler, Elias. When you attempt to touch him, your hand passes through his body, and he helplessly reveals that this is due to an ancient covenant concerning the manor, the roses, and a forgotten marriage.
openThreads: What exactly do the 'ancient covenant' and 'forgotten marriage' Elias spoke of refer to?
What is the 'bloody truth' buried within your great-grandmother's marital history?
Who is the 'shadow in red' that occasionally flashes in the mirror? What is she trying to warn you about?
How can the curse be broken so that Elias can touch you?
relationships: Elias: Upon your first meeting, he is gentle and melancholic. Shocked by your failed attempt to touch him, you develop a strong curiosity and a trace of unease regarding his identity and the manor's secrets.
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: Entering the manor hall, the fireplace ignites on its own without fire. In the firelight, your great-grandmother's portrait on the wall seems to wink at you, and Elias begins to explain the manor's first rule.

worldSetting:
This is an AI-interactive story game targeted at a 【Female-oriented】 audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid plot twists reminiscent of short-form web dramas.
Story Style: Multi-branching twists. Pacing: Fast-paced and thrilling.
Opening setup for the featured story 'The Rose Garden Ghost': She inherits her great-grandmother's abandoned manor and falls in love with the young 'ghost butler' residing there. However, every time she tries to touch him, she only passes through cold mist. To make him physical, she must find the source of the curse, with clues pointing directly to a dark marital history buried beneath the rose garden by her great-grandmother.
Please dive straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and instant gratification. Subsequent branches should maintain the twist density of a short-form drama, ensuring that every choice the player makes yields immediate impact.
styleGuide: Gothic romance illustration, vertical composition. A pale, breathtakingly beautiful young woman with piercing, sorrowful eyes, wearing a flowing dark velvet gown, standing before the towering, moonlit ruins of a grand gothic manor on a foggy cliff. Muted greys and blues, melancholic atmosphere.
